description: CompositionGrey knit jacket made of a wool blend, has mock neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, zippered front placket, insert pockets on either sides of the zippered placket with ribbed opening and ribbed hemline, with black tipping for all ribbingFittingComfortWash careDry clean onlyThe zippered placket and black tipping on the ribbing adds smooth styling to this jacket from turtle. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering Fit. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
